Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix auto-save restore: push content in OnAfterRenderAsync after editors exist

OnInitializedAsync runs before the component has rendered, so the Monaco
editor refs don't exist yet. Move the restored content push to
OnAfterRenderAsync (not gated on firstRender), checking hasRestoredState
and schemaEditor is not null. This ensures editors are ready before we
call SetValue on them.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add HTTP throughput metrics (bytes received/sent)

Add integrateds3.http.bytes_received and integrateds3.http.bytes_sent
counters for tracking upload and download throughput. Metrics are tagged
with integrateds3.operation for per-operation breakdowns.

Recording points:
- bytes_received: PutObject, UploadMultipartPart, S3-compat object uploads
- bytes_sent: StreamObjectResult and MultiRangeStreamObjectResult

Also adds Throughput row to Grafana dashboard (total throughput, upload/
download by operation, total data transferred) and two regression tests.

repository.description: Tech insights and analysis

commit.message:
fix: background location updates firing on schedule with token refresh support (#172)

* Initial plan

* fix: add foreground service to prevent Doze from deferring background location updates

Android's Doze mode defers WorkManager background tasks to periodic maintenance
windows when the screen is off and device is idle. This caused automatic trip
location updates to only trigger when the user returned to the app rather than
firing at the configured interval.

The fix adds TripTrackingService, a lightweight Android foreground service that
shows a persistent "Tracking: [trip name]" notification while automatic updates
are active. Apps with an active foreground service are exempt from Doze mode, so
the existing WorkManager chained tasks now fire on schedule even when the phone
is locked.

Changes:
- android/.../TripTrackingService.kt: new foreground service (keepalive only)
- android/.../MainActivity.kt: MethodChannel to start/stop the service from Dart
- AndroidManifest.xml: declare TripTrackingService with foregroundServiceType=location
- background_update_manager.dart: start/stop foreground service alongside WorkManager

Co-authored-by: tomassirio <19593836+tomassirio@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/tomassirio/wanderer-frontend/sessions/8f394c2a-60f4-420c-ad60-cbc8bbe8d1f1

* fix: refresh expired access token in background update task

The background task was failing with "Authentication required" because it
only checked whether a token existed, not whether it had expired. Replace
the raw null-check with TokenRefreshManager.ensureValidToken(), which
silently refreshes the access token using the stored refresh token before
each update attempt. This means background updates continue to work for
as long as the refresh token is valid — even if the access token expired
hours ago while the phone was locked.

Co-authored-by: tomassirio <19593836+tomassirio@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/tomassirio/wanderer-frontend/sessions/05bf8838-1fc7-407f-bd02-dc9c114cbc5c

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: tomassirio <19593836+tomassirio@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add multi-squad hub + sub-squad monitoring (Phase 1 + 2)

Phase 1 - Sub-Squad Support:
- data-reader.js: new readSubSquads() scans .squad/sub-squads/{name}/ for nested .squad/ dirs
- html-generator.js: conditional Sub-Squads tab with expandable team roster, agents, decisions
- Dashboard shows sub-squad count in stats grid when sub-squads exist

Phase 2 - Multi-Squad Hub:
- New src/config-reader.js reads optional squads.config.json with squad entries
- build.js: generates dist/hub.html + dist/squads/{id}/index.html when config exists
- serve.js: hub at /, individual squads at /squads/:id, timestamp aggregates all roots
- Hub uses Pico.css dark theme, clickable squad cards with agent/decision counts
- All inline scripts use string-array-join pattern (no template literal conflicts)

Fully backward compatible: without squads.config.json, single-squad mode unchanged.

commit.message:
feat: az-diagram-autogen v0.1.0

Interactive Azure architecture diagram generator with 605 official Azure icons.

- CLI: az-diagram-autogen -s services.json -c connections.json -o arch.html
- Python API: from az_diagram_autogen import generate_diagram
- 30+ Azure service types with auto-categorization
- Drag-and-drop, pan/zoom, VNet boundaries, PE visualization
- Multi-subscription/RG hierarchy support
- Self-contained single HTML output
- 17 unit tests, 3 example JSON files

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Feat/saturn (#61)

* chore: update flatpakrepo URLs to castrojo fork

Point Url and Homepage to castrojo.github.io/testhub and
github.com/castrojo/testhub.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add io.github.kolunmi.Saturn

Saturn is a GNOME GTK4/libadwaita Flatpak launcher and application
manager by Eva M (kolunmi). Built with Meson (C) and a Common Lisp
backend via ECL (Embeddable Common Lisp).

Build notes:
- ECL compiled from source (tag 24.5.10) — first build is slow
- 15 CL library dependencies, all pinned to specific commits
- Runtime: org.gnome.Platform//50
- x-skip-install-test: true for bootstrap (remove after first index commit)

Broad filesystem permissions (--filesystem=home, /var/lib/flatpak,
--talk-name=org.freedesktop.Flatpak) are justified for a Flatpak
manager application.

Assisted-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 via GitHub Copilot
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(saturn): add finish-args-flatpak-system-folder-access lint exception

Saturn needs /var/lib/flatpak access (system-wide flatpak install dir)
since it's a Flatpak launcher/manager.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(saturn): rename app-id → id for flatpak-builder-lint exception resolution

flatpak-builder-lint's infer_appid() only reads the 'id' key, not
'app-id'. When appid cannot be inferred, exceptions are never applied
and all errors are reported unconditionally. Renaming to 'id' (the
canonical form accepted by both flatpak-builder and the linter) allows
our user-exceptions to take effect.

Root cause: flatpak_builder_lint/manifest.py infer_appid returns None
for manifests using the legacy 'app-id' key.

Assisted-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 via GitHub Copilot
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(saturn): add appstream-missing-screenshots builddir lint exception

manifest-lint uses 'metainfo-missing-screenshots', builddir-lint uses
the distinct key 'appstream-missing-screenshots'. Both needed for Saturn
since we have no upstream screenshots yet.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(saturn): add repo-stage screenshot lint exception

Three lint stages use three distinct exception keys for screenshots:
- manifest:  metainfo-missing-screenshots
- builddir:  appstream-missing-screenshots
- repo:      appstream-screenshots-not-mirrored-in-ostree

All three needed since Saturn has no screenshots yet.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(saturn): use app-id key instead of id

testhub's Justfile metadata recipe looks for 'app-id' key;
flatpak-builder accepts both 'id' and 'app-id' but testhub
convention (all other manifests) is 'app-id'.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(justfile): support 'id:' as alias for 'app-id:' in manifest lookup

Newer Flatpak manifests use 'id:' as the canonical field (flatpak-builder
accepts both; flatpak-builder-lint's infer_appid() only reads 'id:').
Saturn uses 'id:' to allow user-exceptions to be resolved by app ID.

Updated all Justfile lookups to handle both keys:
- metadata recipe: falls back to '.id' when '.app-id' is empty
- _compile/_repack/run-test: yq '.".app-id" // .id' for direct reads
- grep-based directory lookups: '-lE (app-id|id): $APP'

All existing apps using 'app-id:' continue to work unchanged.

Assisted-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 via GitHub Copilot
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore(saturn): remove x-skip-install-test bootstrap flag

Build 5 (run 23395028554) succeeded — Saturn is now indexed in the
testhub gh-pages repo. Real e2e install test can now run.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* docs(skills): capture Saturn onboarding lessons

- Add saturn to app-gotchas.md (ECL time, three-stage lint exceptions,
  app-id key requirement, x-skip-launch-check, bootstrap pattern)
- Add two-build bootstrap pattern to pipeline.md
- Add three lint stages section to pipeline.md
- Add manifest key convention (app-id: vs id:) to pipeline.md

Lessons from Saturn CI run 23395028554 (feat/saturn branch).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(saturn): add x-skip-launch-check for headless CI

Saturn is a GTK4 GUI app — flatpak run exits 1 with 'Failed to open
display' in the headless gnome-50 container. x-skip-launch-check skips
the launch test while preserving the flatpak install verification.

Closes castrojo/testhub#6

* fix(pr61): address Copilot review comments

- grep -lE -> grep -lF (4 locations): app IDs contain dots which are
  regex wildcards in ERE mode; -F fixed-string avoids accidental matches
- testhub.flatpakrepo: revert fork-specific castrojo URLs to projectbluefin
- build.yml: remove non-existent e2e-install from container comment
- docs: update app-id vs id guidance in pipeline.md, app-gotchas.md,
  and flatpaks/saturn/GOTCHAS.md to reflect Justfile now supporting both keys

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: return JSON authUrl from connect endpoint for mobile clients

The /connect/:provider endpoint previously returned a 302 redirect to the
OAuth consent URL. Mobile clients using fetch() would follow the redirect
and fail to parse the HTML response as JSON.

Now returns { authUrl: "https://..." } so the mobile app can pass the URL
to WebBrowser.openAuthSessionAsync(). Dev bypass also returns JSON with a
mailassist:// deep link callback URL.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix auto-save restore: push content into editors from OnInitializedAsync

The previous fix put the editor sync in OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender),
but firstRender fires BEFORE RestoreAutoSavedState completes (the first
await yields to the renderer). By the time the restore sets
hasRestoredState=true, OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender=true) has already
run and won't fire again.

Fix: move the editor push into OnInitializedAsync, right after
RestoreAutoSavedState returns. At that point the editors exist (the
component rendered during the await) so SetValue works. Also guard
OnSchemaEditorInit to skip the model-overwrite when a restore is pending.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

之前策略：TrueHD/DTS/AC3 直接路由到 ijkplayer
新策略：始终先尝试 avplayer，avplayer 报 onUnsupportedFormat 时
        自动 fallback 到 ijkplayer（unsupportedFormatFallback='ijkplayer'）

仅在 ffprobe 探测完全失败且无音轨信息时保守走 ijkplayer

commit.message:
Fix boot progress to track full download completion, not just headers

fetch() resolves when response headers arrive, but the body may still
be streaming. Now reads the full arrayBuffer before incrementing the
progress counter, then wraps it in a new Response for Blazor to consume.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
优化: 移除 native 播放后端，默认 avplayer，fallback 改为 ijkplayer

- backend 默认值从 native 改为 avplayer
- unsupportedFormatFallback 默认值从 native 改为 ijkplayer
- 自动路由条件补充 native 分支（同 ffmpeg 一样强制转 ijkplayer）
- resolveAudioRoutingDecision 的 fallback 统一改为 ijkplayer
- 移除 adapter 创建与 init 流程中的 native 死代码分支

播放路由逻辑：
  音频系统支持(AAC等)  → avplayer（系统硬解视频+音频）
  音频不支持(AC3/DTS) → ijkplayer（视频按编码动态硬解，音频软解）
  探测失败/未知        → ijkplayer（保守软解）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
修复: 按视频编码分支决策 ijkplayer 硬解，HEVC 内容关闭 mediacodec-all-videos 防止花屏

- VideoData 新增 videoCodec 字段，由 ffprobe 探测后填充
- resolveAudioRoutingDecision 同时捕获视频编码并返回 videoCodecName
- initPlayer 将 videoCodecName 写入 videoData.videoCodec
- IjkPlayerAdapter 存储 _videoCodec，在 applyDefaultOptions 按编码决策：
  - HEVC 内容：mediacodec-all-videos=0（all-videos=1 会把 HEVC 一起开）
  - H264 内容：按设备真实硬解能力决定 all-videos

commit.message:
fix: resolve runtime issues for Expo SDK 54

- Upgrade to Expo SDK 54 (react-native 0.81.5)
- Fix duplicate react-native via pnpm.overrides and metro blockList
- Auto-detect LAN IP for API calls from mobile device
- Add in-memory DB store for dev mode (no PostgreSQL needed)
- Add dev-mode WebAuthn bypass for mock passkey flows
- Fix auth field name mismatch (credential → response)
- Remove mock emails, add Connect Your Email onboarding

Fix duplicate 'Compiling' console line and auto-save restore mismatch

Two fixes:
1. RunAsync wrote 'Compiling...' twice to console - removed the duplicate.
2. Auto-save restore ran after first render, so Monaco editors had stale
   content from OnInitialized while the model (schemaFiles, activeSampleId)
   was updated by the async restore. Added hasRestoredState flag and
   OnAfterRenderAsync logic to push restored content into the editors
   after they are ready, wrapped in isLoadingContent guard to prevent
   DetachFromSample.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Corvus.Text.Json
repository.description: A version of System.Text.Json to support schema-based code generation.

commit.message:
修复: HEVC 硬解导致 HDR/DV 内容花屏（白点+绿色块）

H265 硬解在 HDR+Dolby Vision 内容下会触发 EGL 渲染链路像素损坏，
强制 useH265Hw=false，H264 保持按设备能力动态决策。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

新增: ijkplayer 硬解能力自适应（最小 Capability NAPI）

- 在 vidall_core_player_napi.cpp 追加 QueryVideoDecoderCapability /
  QueryAudioDecoderCapability，通过 OH_AVCodec_GetCapabilityByCategory
  精确查询设备 H264/H265 硬件解码器
- CMakeLists.txt 追加链接 libnative_media_codecbase.so
- index.d.ts 补充 queryVideoDecoderCapability / queryAudioDecoderCapability 类型声明
- DeviceCapabilityUtil.checkIjkHardwareDecodeSupport() 改为调用 NAPI
  实现真实查询，不再写死返回 false
- IjkPlayerAdapter.applyDefaultOptions() 按查询结果动态设置
  mediacodec-all-videos / mediacodec-hevc，支持硬解则走硬解，否则软解

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Collection Timeline page

Visual timeline showing when each coin was acquired, grouped by
month/year with a vertical timeline design:

- Coins grouped by purchase month with gold dot markers
- Each coin shows image, name, category, ruler, grade, price
- Summary bar: total coins, year span, invested, current value
- Filter: All Coins / Collection Only / Sold Only
- Responsive grid layout within each month group
- Clickable cards link to coin detail page
- Added Timeline nav link (Clock icon) after Stats
- Added /timeline route

commit.message:
refactor: unify Jira + SNow bookmarklets into one 'Toolbox Relay'

The relay script already auto-detects Jira vs SNow via location.hostname —
there was never a technical reason for two separate bookmarklets.

- Renamed all bookmarklet links to '📎 Toolbox Relay'
- SNow Step 1 in CRG and PRB settings now points to the Jira bookmarklet
  instead of providing a duplicate drag target
- Removed cr-snow-bm and prb-snow-bm anchor elements from the DOM
- Removed dead references from crInitBookmarklets() and prbInitBookmarklets()
- tbxUpdateDragHints() simplified — no more separate snow hint IDs
- All Step 3 text updated to reflect unified bookmark name

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(cli): swallow terminal spawn errors gracefully — P8 smoke test passes

- openTerminal() now attaches error handler instead of crashing on ENOENT
- Warp/wt missing on non-Windows prints warning, does not exit non-zero
- P8 verified: Linear fetch → worktree → CLAUDE.md → agent spawn → log ✅

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
